verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In a coastline far away I've seen a boat struggling on a stormy day The tempest's so cruel So hard you can ever tell Whether It will sail once more Or it's a total fail.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I'm glad there's a tie-post The boat is tied to It can never be lost in spite of the rue It's tied a on a sure foundation! It can never vanish and fall O Thank You Lord, You're my all in all:

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the Captain of my soul, You're the Rock on which I stand, You're the Anchor deep inside that's holding me You're the Lighthouse on a hill In the cover of the night Where the wandering boats can find The True Guide Where can I ever go Where can I ever be The Love You give O Lord is THE TIE-POST to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In my daily walk with You I see myself attacked by the enemy The buffet is so hurting Sometimes I can never tell Whether I will fight once more or I'm a total fail

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But I'm glad there's a TIE-POST My boat is tied to I can never ever lost whatever comes through I'm tied on a sure foundation He will never let me fall He will come and save me when I call

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A just man falls seven times and rise again When LOVE is projected, Sovereign grace steps in.
